headline: Reflecting On Drug Development Inputs & Services Stocks’ Q4 Earnings: IQVIA (NYSE:IQV)
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the drug development inputs & services industry, including IQVIA (NYSE:IQV) and its peers.
